title: matricaria pilulifera
intro: Matricaria pilulifera, also known as Japanese chamomile or Japanese daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. Matricaria pilulifera is used to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, digestive problems, and skin irritations, offering benefits like reduced stress, improved sleep quality, and relief from digestive discomfort. The plant can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
